info.title: Charon - WhatsApp Multi-Instance API
info.description: REST API for WhatsApp Web automation, multi-instance management, and real-time messaging built with Go, Echo framework, and whatsmeow library.

data.message: QR codes will be sent via WebSocket. Listen to QR_GENERATED event.

data.nextStep: Call GET /qr/:instanceId to get QR code

post.description:
StartFragment\`secret\` (optional):

\- If provided, SUDEVWA will use this value as the HMAC signing secret for this instance (overwriting any existing secret).  
\- If omitted or empty:  
\- If the instance does not have a secret yet, SUDEVWA will generate a strong random secret and return it in the response.  
\- If the instance already has a secret, the existing secret will be reused.  
\- The active secret is always returned in the response. Store it securely and use it to verify the \`X-SUDEVWA-Signature\` header on your webhook server.EndFragment

get.description:
> /api/warming/rooms?status=ACTIVE  
  
Use status param to filter active rooms.

patch.description:
StartFragment

**`Valid values:`**

- `"ACTIVE"  - Start warming`
    
- `"PAUSE" - Pause warming`
    
- `"STOPPED" - Stop warming`
    
- `"FINISHED"  - Mark as finished`
    

EndFragment

post.description:
What will happen

- `current_sequence → 0`
    
- `status → ACTIVE`
    
- `next_run_at → NOW()`
    
- `Room starts fromi awal lagi.`

company_description.example: We are a company specializing in digital communication services, particularly WhatsApp Blast and WhatsApp Automation, helping businesses reach their customers effectively.

post.description:
`"application": "marketing", // for single application`

`"application": "marketing, sales, support", //for multi application`

`"application": "\*" //for all application`

`"message_type" = direct or group`

application/json.example:
{
  "worker_name": "Test Blast",
  "circle": "one",
//   "application": "marketing", // for single application
  "application": "marketing, sales, support", //for multi application
  "message_type": "direct",
  "interval_min_seconds": 5,
  "interval_max_seconds": 15,
  "enabled": true,
  "allow_media": false,
  "webhook_url": "https://webhook.site/374a1472-6858-43b5-908f-36dddfd41c95",
  "webhook_secret": "sudevwa-ganteng"
}

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Available applications retrieved successfully",
    "data": [
        "cron-generate-sep-gagal",
        "cron-pengisian-assesmen-awal",
        "cron_kunjungan_berulang_pasien",
        "Dokumen SKDP",
        "pengingat-esign",
        "reservasi-berkas-valid",
        "reservasi-revisi-berkas",
        "Triase Assessment Awal",
    ]
}

data.note: Number is not registered. Message sending will be blocked unless ALLOW_9_DIGIT_PHONE_NUMBER=true is set

post.description: Insert a single WhatsApp message into the outbox queue for asynchronous delivery by the worker.
Batch version of /api/outbox/enqueue. Accepts an array of messages under `messages`.

get.description: Return delivery status and metadata for a single queued message.
Paginated list of outbox messages. Non-admin callers see only their own messages.

cookieAuth.name: session
cookieAuth.description: Server-side session cookie (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict). Set by POST /login.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Outbox API key (prefix hwa_). Used only by /api/outbox/* endpoints.
